titleStmt.title: SII 17.319: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 319. (A.R. No. 290 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine to the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.
This record begins with the praśasti Tirumaṉṉivaḷara, etc., of the king.

It records the gift of 150 cows to the temple of Tirukkāḷatti-mahādēva by Chaḷukkiyakālakālaṉ Kāḷappiriyaṉ, the Kaṇkāṇi-nāyakam of Āṟṟūr-nāḍu. The cows were distributed in the presence of Veḷipāk-kiḻāṉ Kōyilmārāyaṉ, the Śrīkāryam and dēvarkanmigaḷ of the temple, at the instance of the donor, among the shepherds Pallaṉ Śāttaṉ, Pallaṉ Śāṇaṉ, Toṭṭi Mādhavaṉ••• tta-kōṉ, and Śaṅgaṉ Aḻiñjil, 30 a piece, stipulating the daily supply by each of them of 1 uḻakku of ghee measured by Arumoḻidēvan nāḻi. and another (2) endowment of 9 aṉṟāḍu naṟkāśu, paid into the temple treasury by Vallaṉ Kiḻāṉ Śaḍaṅgavi Sōmaṉ of Pūṅguṉṟam in Tirumuṉaippāḍi for the supply of 1 āḻākku of ghee out of the interest on the endowed amount for mantradīpam, andikkāppu and tiruvāḷatti.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum porccayappāvaiyuñ cirttaṉic celvi yun taṉ perum teviyarā
ki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiyalūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭun tuṭar vaṉavepli paṭaṟ vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷi cūḻmatiṭ koḷḷip pākkaiyu
ma naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikaṭakkamum porukaṭariḻattaraican tamuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻilmuṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkal teṉ
ṉavaṉ vaitta cun=taramuṭiyum Intiraṉāramun teṇṭirai yīḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅkula
taṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palpaḻantivuñ ceruviṟci
ṉavi liruppatorukālaraicukaḷaikaṭṭa paricirāmaṉ mevaruñ cāntimaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅ
koṭu paḻimika mucaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyiliraṭṭa pāṭi yeḻaraiyilakka
mum navanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavira cakkarakkoṭṭamum mutirvaṭavallai matura maṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭaivaḷai
nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veccilai vira pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭai paḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇ(ñ)cirtti
yātinakaravaiyil cantiraṉṟol kulattin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamaṟk kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu
niṟaikulataṉakkuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñceṟimiḷaiy Oṭṭaviṣeyamum pūcurar cernal kocalai nāṭum tanmapā
laṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukattākkiya tikkaṇakir
ttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=tacan=taṉ māviḻintoṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭaṟcaṅkuvoṭṭa
l mahipālaṉai veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷiya Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇ
ṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭal Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tirtta teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum māpporuta
ṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa śrīrājentracoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 2āvatujayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattup perumpāṇappāṭi tiruveṅkaṭa koṭṭattu Āṟṟurnāṭṭu tirukkāḷatti
mahādevarkku Ittevar citārattup pacu kuṭuttu tirunan=tāviḷakkerikka Iṉṉāṭṭukaṇkāṇi nāyakañ
ceykiṉṟa caḷukkiyakālakālaṉ kāḷappiriyan colla tirukkāḷatti mahādevar śrīkāriya (ma)ñcey
kinṟa veḷipākkiḻāṉ koyilmārāyanum tirukkāḷatti mahādevarkanmikaḷum Iruntu mummuṭi coḻapurattu manṟā
ṭi pallaṉ cāttaṉ pacu muppatu koṇṭu śan=tirātittavaṟ Erikka kaṭava tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟum maṉ
ṟāṭi pallaṉ cāṇaṉ pacu muppatu koṇṭu śan=tirātittavaṟ Erikka kaṭava tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟum manṟāṭi
toṭṭi mātavaṉ pacu muppatu koṇṭu can=tirātittavaṟ Erikka kaṭava tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟum manṟāṭi
tta koṉ pacu muppatu koṇṭu ca
n=tirātittavaṟ Erikkakaṭava tirunan=tāviḷa
kku Oṉṟum maṉṟāṭi caṅkaṉ Aḻiñ
cil pacu muppatu koṇṭu can=tirātit
tavaṟ Erikka kaṭava tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟum
Āka tirunan=tāviḷakku Añcinukku viḷakku Oṉṟi
nukku Arumoḻitevaṉāl ney Uḻakkāka ca
n=tirātittavaṟ celuttuvomāṉom Ivvaṉaivo
m nāḷatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattut tirumu
ṉaippāṭip pūṅkuṉṟattu vallaṅkiḻāṉ caṭaṅkavi co
maṉ tirukkāḷatti mahaātevaṟkku cantirātittavaṟ niṟpatā
ka Ittevarkku mantiradīpattukkum Antikkāppukkum
tiruvāḷattikkum nicata ney Āḻākkāka Ittevar paṇṭārat
tu Ittevarkku mutalākki vaitta Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu Oṉpatu
Oṉpatukkum palicai nicata ney Āḻākkum Uṭaiyār paṇṭā
ratte yaṭṭic cantikaṭoṟum mantiratipamum Antikāppu
m tiruvāḷattiyum can=tirātittavaṟ Ittevar paṇṭārattey
koṇṭu Ittevakanmikaḷ celuttuvatākavum nāḷa
tu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk koṭṭattu ĀṟṟūStops here.
Digital edition of SII 17.319 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
